title: Critical editor fixes: undo/redo, arrow redesign, annotation-shadow bug
goal: Fix the things that make the current editor feel unpolished. These are the worst bugs from the user's report; each task starts by REPRODUCING the issue (per CLAUDE.md) before fixing. TDD: arrow geometry + shadow extent are PhotonzCore/PhotonzRender work — tests first.

tasks.title: Undo/redo wired across the whole editor (⌘Z / ⇧⌘Z)
tasks.notes: User reports no undo/redo. Core `History` (snapshot undo) exists from phase 0/1 — reproduce first to find the gap (likely the editor UI / menu items not calling History.perform, or annotation/text/transform mutations bypassing it). Ensure EVERY document mutation routes through History.perform, add Edit menu items + ⌘Z/⇧⌘Z, and verify redo stack clears on new edits. Add tests for any mutation paths found bypassing History.

tasks.title: Arrow redesign: proportioned head + tapered tail flair, adjustable size, curved + styles
tasks.notes: Default arrowhead is microscopic and unadjustable. Redesign in PhotonzCore Geometry.arrowhead (TDD): head visibly wider than the shaft, sensible default proportions scaled to a NEW user-adjustable arrowhead-size parameter (separate from stroke width), and a subtle taper/flair at the tail. Surface the size control in the annotation style popover. Update AnnotationRasterizer to draw the new shape. Keep existing endpoint-drag/resize remap working. CLEANSHOT PARITY (from competitive-cleanshot.md): also add a CURVED arrow variant and a small set of arrow styles (the curve control point is editable). Curved-arrow geometry is TDD in PhotonzCore; deeper style expansion can spill to phase 14 if 10 gets heavy.

tasks.title: Annotation shadow follows the stroke, not the bounding box; adjustable
tasks.notes: BUG: shadow currently renders around the layer's rectangular frame, so an arrow on a red background is invisible and 'adjusting the shadow' shadows a square. Reproduce, then make the shadow derive from the rasterized annotation's alpha (the actual arrow/line/shape pixels) in PhotonzRender, and expose an adjustable shadow for annotations in the style popover. Pixel-test that the shadow hugs a diagonal arrow, not its bbox.
